summary: Driving backend and frontend development for enterprise platforms, from microservices architecture to cloud-native deployments on AWS.
responsibilities: Led the migration of a monolithic application to a microservices-based architecture, enhancing Angular-based frontend modules along the way
Designed backend services using Java, Spring Boot and Quarkus with clear API boundaries, clean architecture principles and scalable data access patterns
Integrated AWS services including EC2, S3, RDS, CloudWatch and OpenSearch for cloud deployment, monitoring, logging and operational visibility
Designed and documented APIs using OpenAPI/Swagger
Worked with Kafka-based event-driven communication to decouple services and improve asynchronous processing
achievements: Improved system performance by 40% through the microservices migration, enhancing scalability, maintainability and deployment efficiency
Established cloud monitoring and logging practices across EC2, S3, RDS, CloudWatch and OpenSearch

summary: Led frontend architecture initiatives and mentored teams on Angular best practices while building RESTful and SOAP-based web services.
responsibilities: Developed a flexible, well-structured and highly modularized frontend architecture, built to be easy to maintain
Mentored teams in Angular, promoting best practices and scalable frontend development
Built web services using RESTful API and SOAP API
achievements: Established scalable frontend architecture patterns adopted across the team
Raised team-wide Angular proficiency through hands-on mentoring

summary: Delivered end-to-end software solutions for enterprise clients, including Petronas, spanning UI development, component integration and identity management.
responsibilities: Hands-on software development with Angular, HTML5, CSS, Java and JavaScript
Developed and tested individual components, debugged existing code and integrated components into complete application flows
Implemented solutions using OpenText App Works, Entity Modelling, OAuth and Single Sign-On (SSO)
achievements: Built a centralized tax portal automating back-charging processes across Petronas operating units, with time tracking, notes, Outlook integration and audit trails
Delivered a group finance accrual system with a monitoring dashboard and workflow features for review and approval
